name: Guangdong Lingxiao Pump Industry Co.,Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Lingxiao Pump Industry Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells small household and industry support electric pumps primarily in China. The company offers stainless steel, fitness and entertainment, submersible, cast iron, and pipeline pumps, as well as IEC motors. Its products are used for reverse osmosis water treatment, central air conditioning, frequency conversion constant pressure water supply, machine tool, massage bath crock, spa, domestic pool integration, mariculture, fountain, sewage treatment, irrigation, ornamental fish pond, solar hot water circulation, household water pressurization, agricultural cultivation water supply, pressurized water heater, fan, air compressor, and woodworking machinery applications. The company also exports its products to approximately 100 countries or regions worldwide. Guangdong Lingxiao Pump Industry Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in Yangchun, China.
